Manaskin  

Description

1: Increase Absorb Damage by 11 (L52) to 592 (L60)
6: Increase Mana by 1 per tick

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 330 Skill: Abjuration
Casting Time: 5 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 0
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Deletable: Yes Blockable: Yes
Focusable: Yes Dispellable: Yes
Interruptable: Yes Short Buff Box: No
Target Type: Self Spell Type: Beneficial
Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: Your skin gleams with an incandescent glow.
Cast on other: Soandso 's skin gleams with an incandescent glow.
Effect Fades: Your skin returns to normal.

Game Description

Covers you in a magical skin that absorbs some damage before dissipating. This spell also increases your mana regeneration rate. Consumes a peridot when cast.

Reagents

  • Peridot x 1

Items with this effect

  • Boots of Kylthorn
  • Fabled Boots of Kylthorn
  • Spell: Manaskin

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Manaskin
ClassLevel
WIZ52
NEC52
Expansion:

Duration:
2 hours
  • Comments (8)
  • Sold By (11)
  • NPCs with Ability (17)

This spell is also sold by Gruppip in Abysmal Sea.

▲ Page top
confused
QuoteReply
# Nov 02 2003 at 8:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591788774732
11 posts
Just started usin manaskin, and it seems the spell doesnt last 2 hrs when takin a beatin, or canniblizin myself. After extra hit points are gone , spell effects gone as well. Am I missin somethin here or is that common?
▲ Page top
RE: confused
QuoteReply
# Nov 16 2003 at 2:51 AM Rating: Decent
Woofie
Sage
90 posts
thats because it's a rune spell. like all other rune spells, once it takes enough damage, it breaks, and the spell disappears. when the spell disappears, so do all its effects, incluidng the regen.
▲ Page top
Beast Crack
QuoteReply
# Aug 08 2003 at 11:50 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591792412191
10 posts
If I do not have Manaskin on, I can get BST crack and then cast Manaskin and all will stick. If Manaskin is on...you can not recieve BST crack. Thought I'd let some wizzy's out there that you can get around the obstacle by not having Manaskin on until after you get all your other buffs on, as all will stack if you do it in the right order.

Yidazen
58 Wizard Luclin Server

Edited, Fri Aug 8 12:41:05 2003
▲ Page top
RE: Beast Crack
QuoteReply
# Oct 25 2003 at 3:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591792177509
View User Forum
56 posts
just confirming this stacking method works as of today. Didn't try it the other way around.
▲ Page top
Yup

Yes, one peridot.

Scholar

yes a peridot, seems kind of pricey unless you dont plan on getting hit and just want it for the mana regen.
